response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems in compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and a C++ bachelor thesis, with the bulk of career spent in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No cloud compute platform leadership or production C++ distributed systems experience is evident.
strengths: Long track record of senior/staff engineering roles with mentoring, workshops, and teaching experience
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Some exposure to high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++ experience — only a brief NI role and academic project
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform background
Senior engineering tenure and mentoring history
